rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RONALD ALDEN HUMMEL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/13/19 - The 9/18/17 order specifies payment of $400k + accrued interest to beneficiary Willie. Petitioner has paid him $100k + interest, leaving $300k + interest to be paid. Petitioner proposes paying $557,234.38 to the beneficiary. Please file a declaration setting forth the calculation of that amount. This seems too high to be $300k + interest. Endorsed-filed copies of all pleadings must be received in Room 202 no later than 2/6/19.
